h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, centered, significant vertical spacing above and below. Used for the main report title.
h1.example_text: Restrictions on Land Ownership by Foreigners in Selected Jurisdictions

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, serif font, centered, typically used for dates or primary sub-sections on the cover.

h3.visual_description: Small, serif font, centered, located at the bottom of the cover page for file identifiers.

visual_matchers.pattern: Top-left aligned logo with 'LAW LIBRARY' in bold sans-serif and 'LIBRARY OF CONGRESS' in orange/red sub-text.
Centered block of text at the very bottom of the page in a smaller, lighter grey serif font.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Bluebook or legal style (implied by source), typically appearing as footnotes in body text (not visible on cover).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: The footer contains a recurring contact line: 'The Law Library of Congress, Global Legal Research Directorate (202) 707-5080 • law@loc.gov • http://www.law.gov'
